description: We are seeking a talented Java Developer to design, develop, and maintain high-performance, scalable Java applications. In this role, you will collaborate with cross-functional teams to build microservices, write clean and efficient code, and ensure application security and reliability.
requirements: Strong expertise in Core Java (version 8 or higher) and OOP concepts.
Hands-on experience with Spring Framework, Spring Boot, and Spring Security.
Solid understanding of relational databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and ORM (Hibernate).
Experience in designing and developing RESTful Web Services.
Familiarity with containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes) and CI/CD pipelines.
responsibilities: Design, build, and maintain efficient, reusable, and reliable Java code.
Ensure the best possible performance, quality, and responsiveness of the applications.
Identify bottlenecks and bugs, and devise solutions to mitigate these problems.
Help maintain code quality, organization, and automation.
